nasb.text: When He had entered Jerusalem, all the city was stirred, saying, “Who is this?”

esv.text: And when he entered Jerusalem, the whole city was stirred up, saying, “Who is this?”

cnv.text: 耶穌進了耶路撒冷，全城都震動起來，他們問：“這人是誰？”

ccb.text: 耶稣进耶路撒冷时，全城轰动，说：“这是谁？”

csbs.text: 耶稣进了耶路撒冷，全城都轰动了，人们问：“这个人是谁？”
